brief: 캐논 샷 게임의 플레이어 대포 스프라이트. 3/4 측면, 바퀴 달린 금속 대포, 작은 깃발, 모바일 화면에서 잘 보이는 덩어리감, 투명 배경
style: 16bit 픽셀아트, 높은 대비, 깔끔한 외곽선, 레트로 아케이드, 노랑/강철 회색 포인트

history.generationPrompt: Create a sprite of a player's cannon for a cannon shot game: 3/4 side view, metal cannon on wheels with a small flag. Ensure the design is chunky and visible on mobile screens, with a transparent background. Use a 16-bit pixel art style, maintaining high contrast, clean outlines, and a retro arcade feel, emphasizing yellow and steel gray tones.
history.makerChangeSummary: This prompt maintains the core request and style while clarifying the design specifics for better production readiness. It outlines the visual style and color palette clearly, ensuring the cannon is suitable for mobile visibility and adheres to the requested retro aesthetic.

strengths: Excellent silhouette and volumetric reading appropriate for mobile screens.
Color palette (Yellow/Steel Gray) perfectly matches the requirements.
Pixel art execution is high quality with consistent pixel size (no mixels) and clean dark outlines.
Perspective is accurately rendered in the requested 3/4 side view.
issues: Background is solid white rather than the requested transparent alpha channel (requires external masking).
Some shading on the wheels is slightly noisy, though acceptable for 16-bit styles.
evaluation.revisedPrompt: Create a sprite of a player's cannon for a cannon shot game: 3/4 side view, metal cannon on wheels with a small flag. Chunky design, distinct silhouette for mobile visibility. 16-bit pixel art style, high contrast, clean outlines, retro arcade feel, yellow and steel gray tones. Isolate on a solid uniform background for easy removal.
